locator.quote: systematically over-confident in the middle deciles

text: The predictor is well-calibrated at extreme deciles but systematically over-confident in the middle deciles - exactly where the value-edge gate admits.

locator.quote: Scalping sidesteps the issue by capturing a bounded spread per pair regardless of predictor calibration in the middle

text: Scalping sidesteps the issue by capturing a bounded spread per pair regardless of predictor calibration in the middle; directional betting is fully exposed to it.
